changelog: v4.1 — Deconcentration for less short-term pain. Caps single-fund concentration (EquityCommodity max_weight 50→30%) and adds a correlation-cluster cap (cluster_cap) plus a crowding-regime deconcentrator (crowd_deconcentrate) to spread a topping, over-crowded book; knobs re-centered for the 30% cap (crowd_deconcentrate gate 0.6, defensive tau 0.02). vs v4.0: CAGR 17.78→17.52%, worst-12mo −11.9→−8.6%, Copley 1.50→2.03, MaxDD unchanged (−22.3%), GFC/COVID/2022 crash protection unchanged. Robust in both sub-period halves. Adds advisory warn_windows (12-window mild set). Research: strategies/short-term-pain-research.md.
